uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds MOD 1 frame; expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (BAT_V 2.952, DOOR_OPEN_STATUS 0, DOOR_OPEN_TIMES 5, LAST_DOOR_OPEN_DURATION 3, ALARM 0) and normalizing to the vocabulary.

uplink.description: MOD 1 door sensor, contact open with alarm
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds MOD 1 frame, byte[0] bit 0x80 set (door open) and byte[9] bit 0x01 set (alarm); expected.data confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js (DOOR_OPEN_STATUS 1, DOOR_OPEN_TIMES 42, LAST_DOOR_OPEN_DURATION 15, ALARM 1).
Synthetic in-bounds MOD 2 frame, byte[0] bit 0x40 set (leak); expected.data confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js (WATER_LEAK_STATUS 1, WATER_LEAK_TIMES 3, LAST_WATER_LEAK_DURATION 8).
Synthetic in-bounds MOD 2 frame, byte[0] bit 0x40 clear (no leak); expected.data confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js (WATER_LEAK_STATUS 0, WATER_LEAK_TIMES 1, LAST_WATER_LEAK_DURATION 2).

uplink.description: MOD 3 combined door + water-leak, both active with alarm
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds MOD 3 frame, byte[0] bits 0x80 and 0x40 set (door open + leak), byte[9] bit 0x01 set (alarm); expected.data confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js (DOOR_OPEN_STATUS 1, WATER_LEAK_STATUS 1, ALARM 1).
